nodes.title: ic-lora-prompt

widgets_values:
A 25-year-old East Asian phoenix priestess performs a sunrise ritual on a circular cliff-top altar above a sea of clouds, wearing a white, vermilion and antique-gold ceremonial gown as a translucent fire phoenix rises behind her.

Beat 1: She brings both hands together before her chest while the eight bronze altar markers ignite one after another.
Beat 2: She opens her arms slowly, and feather-shaped sleeves spread outward as glowing embers rise from the stone circle.
Beat 3: The fire phoenix unfolds its enormous wings behind her, sending warm light across the clouds without touching her body.
Beat 4: She steps forward once and lifts her chin as a controlled wave of flame travels around the altar's outer ring.
Beat 5: She holds a triumphant symmetrical pose while the phoenix stabilizes above her and sunrise breaks across the distant mountains.
nodes.title: text_to_video_prompt
